message:
refactor: convert inner-match if-guards to match-arm guards across crates

Collapse `Arm => { if cond { body } }` into `Arm if cond => { body }`
throughout mermaid, text_effects, syntax, terminal_model, caps_probe,
view_layout_translator, table_theme, text, wrap, command_palette,
virtualized, and mermaid_render. Pure structural cleanup, no behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
